title: Supply Chain Manager - Wabash National India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Wabash National India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!
